articles.summary: TLDR is one of ThreatSpike's most efficient channels, with $25,000-$75,000 generated in net new business pipeline per campaign. This case study breaks down ThreatSpike's exact strategy, shares overall results, and reveals the ads that drove performance. Read the

articles.title: GOOGLE SAYS AUSTRALIAN LAW ON TEEN SOCIAL MEDIA USE 'EXTREMELY DIFFICULT' TO ENFORCE
articles.summary: Google said Australia's new law banning social media for people under 16 will be hard to enforce and won't improve online safety. The law, effective in December, requires platforms to estimate users' ages with AI instead of verifying them. Google argued it could cause unintended effects and said YouTube shouldn't be treated as a social platform. Australia will be the first country to impose such a ban.

articles.title: HUGE PROPORTION OF YOUNG AMERICANS NOW REPORTING SERIOUS COGNITIVE ISSUES
articles.summary: Cognitive issues among Americans aged 18-39 have nearly doubled from 5.1% to 9.7% over the past decade. The sharpest increases appeared among people earning under $35K, those without a high school diploma, and Indigenous Americans. Researchers point to factors like economic stress, inequality, and technology use, warning that the trend could affect long-term health and productivity.

articles.title: WHAT TO DO WITH IG'S LATEST UPDATES
articles.summary: Instagram keeps changing, so social teams need to prioritize DMs with Broadcast Channels and Manychat. Carousels and Stories should be posted consistently to maintain audience habits. Every Reel needs to act as an introduction to the brand, reaching new eyes rather than existing followers.

articles.title: THE BEST MARKETING IDEAS FROM THE PAST 7 DAYS
articles.summary: Smart design and psychology can turn marketing into participation. Youform and Crisp use prompt-engineered “Ask AI” buttons to fake transparency and build trust. OpenAI rewards loyalty with collectible coins that spark social proof. Nespresso turns its decaf claim into a game customers can test. A dark-mode programming book wins by mirroring developer culture. And “Draw a Fish” drives viral growth through fast, shareable creation. Each example earns attention by letting people engage, not just observe.

articles.title: TIME TO ANSWER BY GO FISH
articles.summary: This free Chrome extension measures how long it takes a visitor to reach an answer on the page they're reading. It's designed to help spot why visitors bounce before they convert. To use it, open the side panel, set your question and reading speed, and click the element that contains the answer.

articles.title: DOES QUORA MARKETING STILL WORK? YES. HERE'S 5 NEW IDEAS
articles.summary: Quora ranks for over 191M keywords and is frequently cited in AI-generated search results. With 410M monthly organic visitors, the platform aligns user intent with content structure, as visitors typically look for specific answers during mid-funnel research. Content that follows a structured format, such as answer, explanation, example, and takeaway, has a higher likelihood of being extracted by AI platforms. Quora Spaces serve as thematic repositories for educational content, and paid tools like Promoted Answers and Lead Gen Forms support on-platform engagement and data capture.

articles.title: FIRST COMES THE INNOVATOR, THEN COMES THE INNOVATIVE MARKETER
articles.summary: Innovation alone doesn't sustain market leadership. Brands win by pairing it with marketing innovation. SharkNinja outpaced Dyson by investing 20-25% of revenue in agile marketing versus Dyson's 2-4%. Similarly, Alo and Fabletics surpass Lululemon through storytelling and influencer strategy. The strongest brands blend product and marketing innovation through collaboration and adaptability.

articles.title: YOU'RE PAYING YOUR SALES AND MARKETING TEAMS TO SABOTAGE EACH OTHER
articles.summary: Too many orgs reward marketing for quantity and sales for quality, setting them up to clash and fail. Instead, focus on bringing high-fit, high-LTV leads that sales can confidently close. Tactics include passing product usage insights back into content and campaigns, and syncing on a shared success metric like pipeline velocity. Real alignment means using sales feedback within 48 hours and creating evergreen marketing loops powered by real customer data.

articles.title: META ADS PIXEL TRACKING, EXPLAINED
articles.summary: The Meta Pixel improves ad performance by tracking user actions and sending data back to Meta Ads for optimization. One merchant increased its conversion rate from 0.3% to 27.0% after correctly setting up the pixel, showing how vital accurate tracking is. Shopify integrates the Meta Pixel and Meta's Conversion API to measure results, identify target audiences, and refine ad strategies based on real purchase data.

articles.title: 8 SEO UPDATES YOU NEED TO KNOW
articles.summary: Updates include the expansion of Google's ‘try on' tools, new languages for AI Mode, and ChatGPT's direct integration with apps.

articles.title: 9 HABITS FOR A SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER
articles.summary: Habits include building a response library, tracking monthly top posts, and celebrating small wins.
